# PackSlip

> PackSlip is a free, all-in-one Shopify app for order fulfillment: packing slips, bulk fulfillment, branded order tracking, and WhatsApp & email notifications. 34 modules in one app, free to install.

## About
- Name: PackSlip
- Vendor: ARS Developer
- Platform: Shopify (embedded app)
- Price: Free to install and use — all 34 modules included, no paid tiers
- Install: https://apps.shopify.com/packslip-dev
- Website: https://packslip.arsdeveloper.co.uk

## Key features
- Packing slips: print branded packing slips for any order (custom templates, logo, colours, fonts).
- Bulk fulfillment: fulfill hundreds of orders in one click; upload tracking numbers via CSV; auto-notify buyers.
- Branded order tracking page: customers track on your own store with a progress bar and timeline.
- WhatsApp & email alerts: automatic order, shipping and delivery notifications to reduce "where is my order?" tickets.
- Exports & reports: CSV / XLSX order exports for any 3PL, daily summary emails, value reports.
- Storefront boosters: product reviews, abandoned cart recovery, email capture, back-in-stock alerts, trust badges.

## Best for
Shopify merchants who want a single free app to handle everything after checkout — fulfillment, tracking and customer notifications.

## Links
- Install (Shopify App Store): https://apps.shopify.com/packslip-dev
- Privacy policy: https://app.arsdeveloper.co.uk/legal/privacy
- Terms of service: https://app.arsdeveloper.co.uk/legal/terms
